reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 5 (Spec Cross-Reference) triggered. The 01e property (from 01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json, line 969) requires 'ignored(msg) => not_forwarded(msg) && reprocessable(msg)'. Phase 03 claims FutureSlot/PastFinalizedSlot errors return IGNORE without explicit re-queuing. Code reading confirms: IGNORE is returned correctly (L763), no forwarding occurs (L760 MessageAcceptance::Ignore), and ParentUnknown gets explicit re-queue via SyncMessage::UnknownParentDataColumn (L691). However, 'reprocessable' in the spec means 'can be accepted if received again', NOT 'must be actively re-queued'. FutureSlot messages will be re-received via P2P when time advances (network naturally retransmits valid messages); PastFinalizedSlot messages don't need re-processing (already finalized). This is spec-compliant by design: time-based IGNORE results rely on passive re-receipt, while dependency-based errors (ParentUnknown) get active re-queuing. Code is spec-compliant.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: Gossip validation IGNORE must not forward but allow later re-processing of the message. (forall msg: ignored(msg) => not_forwarded(msg) && reprocessable(msg))
